name: goads
description: Teaches Codex to drive the goads CLI for Google Ads — GAQL reads and preview-then-confirm writes.

interface.shortDescription: Drive the goads Google Ads CLI — GAQL reads and preview-then-confirm writes.
interface.longDescription: Teaches an agent when and how to drive the goads CLI: GAQL search/report reads, account listing, and preview-then-confirm writes against campaigns, ad groups, keywords, and budgets.
defaultPrompt: What's my campaign spend this week?
Set this campaign's daily budget to $50.
List my accessible Google Ads accounts.
